title: The Fungus That Turns Ants Into Zombies
hook: A fungus can hijack an ant's body — and force it to climb to its death.
description: Explain Ophiocordyceps (cordyceps) infection of carpenter ants: behavioral manipulation, death grip on vegetation, spore release. Ground in peer-reviewed entomology / parasitology (e.g., Hughes lab and related Ophiocordyceps research). Do not claim mind-control of humans. Keep scientifically accurate and vivid.
